review_text: Lincoln was very helpful and friendly at checkin. All staff friendly and a great location for day trips.
A great budget friendly option just outside Hobart. The staff were wonderful.
Good place to stay close to Hobart & the airport, with comfortable cabins at an affordable price. If noise is an issue not great as you are right next to the freeway, but I slept alright.
Good location, and it would be even better if there were a playground.
The cabins are clean and comfortable

Lovely caravan park not too far from Hobart City. Definitely worth the short drive if you're looking for budget accommodation. Well maintained cabins and camp ground. It had everything we needed during our getaway. Check in was seamless. Thank you for a great place to stay during our Tassie trip!

Katastrophaler Lärm durch die Autobahn.
Keine Heizung im Raum.
Zimmer war sauber.
Man kann direkt vor dem Häuschen parken.
good locati0n. clean

Because of the bad experience I had 2 years back, I hesitated initially and went with my booking since it was reasonable for a cabin for 3. And this time, I definitely see an improved service. Keep up. They have public bus service next door.
Pas mal mais dommage que la table du Bungalow familial soit minuscule
Spacious cabin for four of us. Everything you need is available. Very close to city (7mins). Very happy with our stay.
고속도로 소음만 빼면 정말 좋아요.

Ok .. we started our Tasmania trip in Hobart at discovery parks.  We stayed in an economy cabin that could sleep 4.  Don’t bother booking if it’s 4 adults, there’s barely enough room to swing a cat in there. The bathroom/toilet was tiny and the overall decor of the cabin was old and dated. The parking spaces are barely big enough for a small car.  We had a family with a small motor home in the parking spot next to our cabin that every time they used it they bumped the side of our cabin on the bedroom side.  NOT ideal.   It was clean enough and served the purpose for our first 2 nights.  We reluctantly came back for our last night and were equally disappointed.  The actual cabin was a little better with the toilet and bathroom separate (still very squishy).  However the bunk bed were kids bunks despite booking for 4 adults.  Also the noise at night was not ideal both noise from the highway and general noise from the other guests (driving at all hours, talking and carrying on at all hours). Sad because it is a great spot.
Noisy as near road. Just for sleep. Nothing special.
good place for holiday

The most diabolical nights sleep me and my partner have ever had. Walking in, the room smelt heavily of mold. The bed was so uncomfortable and we could hear the cars buzzing past on the highway all night. Facilities were good however, only reason we are complaining is for the price you would expect at least a decent bed.
Clear instructions from staff for after-hour key collection. Decent price. Had an excellent sleep. 10min drive from airport. Ideal 👍 thanks

If you want a good nights sleep do not stay here
The park is beside Hobart busiest freeway and the traffic noise doesn’t stop till 100am and starts back at 5.00 am
Lovely little park. 10 mins by car to Hobart city. Standard cabin was comfortable & warm.
Excellent communication. Clean practical room. Great shower.

I recently booked this accommodation for my life companion for 2 nights. He was going to attend an event for his Grandson, and when this event was cancelled, I phoned to cancel the booking. When I spoke to the consultant, I was told that there was a cancellation fee, even though I cancelled 5 days before the date of the booked accommodation. The total for the booking was 2 nights including a credit card fee was $380.39. The cancellation fee was $188.50, which amounted to 1 night's accommodation for the selcted cabin at the park. This is totally unreasonable, given that I gave 5 days notice for the cancellation. This cancellation fee is also totally unreasonable, as there is no apparent information on the booking site about fees for cancellation. I will never book at this place again

We stayed for 2 nights as a family of 4. We found the rooms were clean, comfortable & budget friendly. The staff were quick to fix a hot water issue within minutes. Will stay again when we return to Hobart.
Excellent spot for a few days break
Dated budget cabin.

Location was good as it was close to Hobart, it's old but clean  the laundry is great nice new machines
The staff was very friendly
Convenient location, close to all amenities, easy access, well appointed at a budget price. Used them for 40 years and can highly recommend.

Run as fast as you can!!

Full of mould, traffic and emergency services near by with constant alarms…..

Poor cleaning, minimal towels or suppliers.

Dishonest advertising for businesses on cabin sizes.

Cleaners leaving doors unlocked with and stolen items from the room
Ill never stay at another discovery park again
舒適、整潔, 電子爐、烤箱一應俱全、鍋子、碗盤也都很乾淨, 訂的2房間也都很不錯, 離機場、超商近, 很方便~

Bed mattress was on a downward angle which made it hard to sleep (blood rush to head). Bathrooms were  a bit on the pokey side. Ants seen inside a few times, overall average, what you would expect for a holiday park.
We stayed for three nights in a deluxe spa room.  The room was in great condition. Clean and comfortable.  Location is great.
Cosy place to stay.
Great value. Only downside is the occasional traffic noise from the adjacent highy
Lovely clean and well stocked self contained cabins. They had freshened the room and had the heater on before we arrived and the beds were comfortable. Good amenities with a nice central location.
旅行期間住了數晚，炊煮設備便利

Good place to stay if you are visiting and dont need a fancy place. Rooms and beds were clean and had all basic items required. Internet wasnt great so kids were a little unhappy but we were out most of the time so didnt really have an issue. Check in and out was very simple and quick. Recommended for budget accommodation!

Arrived after the reception close i had not received the key box code. Used the after hours phone, no a swer, left a message. My friend called both the numbers listed on the signature, no answer, left messages. Ended up having to book elsewhere. Contacted for a refund. Was told I was a liar and there was no messages or missed calls from us despite our phone and gps logs proving our story. Dodgy so stay anywhere but here.

I visited this place with my wife and 2 kids and was really disappointed. They charge around 150 per day but the kind of room I got was really small. The bunk bed sheet and mattress protector seems to have been changed or clean. It has all kind of stain and some dirt on top of it looks like it was cockroaches egg. The lady in the reception was helpful and she change that for me. To add to our experience I found some chicken bones and dirty cutlery. When I told the staff they seems like I am being too much demanding and I should expect these things when going to caravan park. Never ever going back to this place and highly not recommend this place to any one.
Everything you need, really clean, really quiet. Great place for an overnight stay.

Very clean
Easy parking
Laundry options
Closer to Hobart
Small kitchenette for quick meals

Grounds keeper complained multiple times about driving too fast when we were not. Don't know what his problem was but it was very frustrating as him and the office lady went out of the way to make a big fuss about it and call our boss. I'm guessing they were bored and had nothing better to do. Also last week the shower drain was blocked and flooded the bathroom in a different cabin and as a builder I could see that the shower was not waterproofed properly.

We have a very comfortable cabin..
Service is very good

Stayed for the first time the past weekend and was very pleased.. the price was great. Room was very clean and alot more spacious then I thought it would of been. The grounds are nice and neat and check in and out was a breeze. Will be staying again :)
Close to airport and walking distance to a nice Tavern.

I just love the theme of discovery parks. This just feels like home with kitchen, dinning and small living area inside a cabin. Of course the cabin differs as per preferences and money but yea it was all good. It is just adjacent to the main highway but i could not hear noises at night, slept peacefully. A little bit upgrade with the AC heating would be great.
